title: CSS Flexbox Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties for creating flexible, one-dimensional layouts using Flexbox.

questions.question: Flexbox is considered a __________ layout model.
Which property is used on the FLEX CONTAINER to align items along the main axis (usually horizontally)?
Which property is used on the FLEX CONTAINER to align items along the cross axis (usually vertically)?
Which flex-item property determines how much an element should grow relative to its siblings to fill up extra space?
What does the 'gap' property on a flex container do?
options: It sets the width of the container.
It automatically adds spacing between all child items in the container.
It changes the font size of the items.
